proposal.claim: commit broadcast redundant: replicas infer commit from ack quorum + aggregate sig
proposal.structural_delta: communication: remove one O(n) broadcast round per commit
proposal.diff:
--- a/log_replication.tla
+++ b/log_replication.tla
 CommitEntry(leader, entry_id) ==
   /\ Cardinality(acks[entry_id]) * 2 > Cardinality(Replicas)
   /\ commit_index' = [commit_index EXCEPT ![leader] = entry_id]
-  /\ BroadcastCommit(leader, entry_id)

review.argument: replicas can verify quorum from aggregate sig (step 3 synergy)

structural_verification.evidence: BroadcastCommit removed, one fewer O(n) round
